MINISTRY OFHQME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th October, 2002 G S R 735(E) —In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 87 of the Punjab Reorganisation Act, 1966 r ,l 0 r 1966)' the Central Government hereby extends to the Union Territory of Chandigarh, the enactments specified in column (1) of the Schedule hereto annexed, subject to the modifications specified m the corresponding entries in column (2) of the said Schedule. SCHEDULE VFZ$!?< Enactment The East Punjab War Awards (Amendment) Act, 1993 (18 of 1993). a 3 3,-4 2. The East Punjab War Awards (Amendment) Act, 1996 (7 of 1996). Modifications 1. In Section 1,— (a) in sub-section (1), for the words, brackets and figures "the East Punjab War Awards (Amendment) Act, 1993", the words, brackets and figures "the East Punjab War Awards (Amendment) Act, 1993, as extended to the Union Territory of Chandigarh" shall be substituted; (b) for sub-section (2), the following sub-section shall be substituted, namely :— "(2) It shall come into force at once". 2. In Section 2, for the words and figures "the East Punjab War Awards Act, 1948", the words and figures "the East Punjab War Awards Act, 1948, as in force in the Union Territory of Chandigarh" shall be substituted. 1. In section 1,— (a) (b) in sub-section (1), for the words, brackets and figures "the East Punjab War Awards (Amendment) Act, 1996", the words brackets and figures "the East Punjab War Awards (Amendment) Act, 1996, as extended to the Union Territory of Chandigarh" shall be substituted; for sub-section (2), the following sub-section shall be substituted, namely :— "(2) It shall come into force at once". In Section 2, for the words and figures "the East Punjab War Awards Act, 1948", the words and figures "the East Punjab War Awards Act, 1948, as in force in the Union Territory of Chandigarh" shall be substituted. [F. No. U-l 1015/4/2001-UTL] P. K. JALALI, Jt. Secy. -- 3 of 4 -- T H E G A Z E T T C O F I N D I A ^ T P ^ R D I N A R ^ P..\RTH- No, Governor of follows :- Be 1. (2) 2. (A) ANNEXURE.
